backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing clip management, user profiles, trending analytics, and access control with functions for saving/deleting clips, calculating similarity scores, generating viral suggestions, and admin statistics.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that handles data migration from old actor schema (with ownerPrincipal) to new actor schema (without ownerPrincipal), preserving clips data.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend components, hooks, and configuration files describing their functionality and purpose.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode theme variables for UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script import for the React application titled 'Beast Clipping'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component with TanStack Router setup, managing routes for home page and admin panel, with state for video playback, clip selection, and AI-generated suggestions.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches admin panel errors and displays a fallback UI with retry and home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard displaying system statistics cards (total clips, trending clips) and a detailed trending clips analytics table with loading states, error handling, and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Displays a single clip as a card with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, and delete functionality with confirmation dialog. Supports selection state and click handling.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of saved clips using ClipCard components, with loading states and empty state messaging. Manages clip selection and deletion through the useClips hook.
Displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips in a scrollable list with viral scores, timestamps, and action buttons to use suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form to create clips with title input and start/end timestamp controls (minutes/seconds). Handles clip creation, validation, and loading suggested or selected clip data.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with header (logo, title, admin link), footer with Caffeine.ai attribution, and conditional admin navigation based on user ownership status.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video loading, and AI clip generation functionality. Displays error states and loading indicators.
Displays a viral score badge with color-coded styling (green/amber/gray), icons (flame/trending/sparkles), and optional label text based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Embeds a YouTube video player in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card using an iframe with the YouTube embed API enabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating an anonymous or authenticated actor based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Fetches admin statistics including total clips count and trending clip analytics from the backend actor using React Query.
Provides mutation hook for auto-generating clip suggestions with viral scores; currently uses mock AI data but designed to integrate with real AI services through backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Handles clip creation with viral score calculation based on duration and title characteristics, then saves clips via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Fetches all clips and provides clip deletion functionality with loading state management using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages clip timestamp state (start/end minutes and seconds), provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and session persistence using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Checks if the current authenticated user is an admin by querying the backend actor's isCallerAdmin method.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Fetches trending clips from the backend actor using React Query with automatic refetching when actor changes.
Provides utilities to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a YouTube video clipping application with 17 completed features including video playback, clip management, AI suggestions, admin panel, and branding updates; notes that AI clip generation is listed but not actually implemented.
